scenario.title: The Adaptive Conversation
scenario.context: You're building a conversational AI that dynamically adjusts its conversation flow based on user responses, sentiment, and engagement level. The system must decide next steps at runtime.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that implements dynamic branching based on runtime analysis of conversation state and user behavior.
constraints: Analyze conversation context to determine next step
Adjust strategy based on detected sentiment/engagement
scenario.exampleInput: Sales conversation: If user shows interest → deep dive on features. If objections → address concerns. If frustration detected → offer human rep. If ready to buy → streamline to checkout. Adapt in real-time.
hints: Define signals that trigger each branch
